name: talk-library
description: Research presentation library for Slidev and PowerPoint academic talks

items.name: academic-clean
items.description: White background, muted blue accents, serif headings

items.name: ucsf-institutional
items.description: UCSF institutional palette: navy/blue, Garamond headings

patterns.description: Slide structure patterns for different talk modes

items.name: slidev-pitfalls
items.description: Slidev implementation gotchas (footer, Mermaid, PDF export)

items.name: pptx-generation
items.description: python-pptx API patterns for PPTX slide creation, theme application, component helpers (DataTable, FigurePanel, CitationBlock, StatResult, FlowDiagram), speaker notes, and error handling

animation.description: Reusable animation pattern definitions with syntax examples (shared via slidev extension)

style.description: Composable CSS presets for colors, typography, textures (shared via slidev extension)

content.description: Content templates for research presentation slides

components.description: Vue components for research-specific slide elements

templates.description: Reusable scripts and templates for Slidev and PowerPoint projects

items.name: playwright-verify
items.description: Playwright slide verification script -- copy to scripts/verify-slides.mjs in each project

items.name: pptx-project
items.description: PowerPoint generation template with theme mappings and skeleton script
